input_text: A coffee cup broke. The stone was heavy. Mike is nice. Emajogi is 20 meters long. The teacher showed a map to the students. The tall man walked into the small room. The tree was cut by the farmer. The length of Nile is 80 kilometers. The horse kept in the stable was calm. Eve reported that Tom arrived. Anna handed Mark a silver key. Sandra moved to the garden. The letter was written in June. Daniel journeyed to the office. Mr Dursley is a Muggle. Winona is a sheep. Estonia contains Tartu. While John was cooking, Mary read a book. The car was washed by Paul. A head of an elephant is green. Tallinn is in Latvia with a probability 50 percent. Mice are afraid of cats. Americans cannot disappear. Sue is a true patriot. Dole was defeated by Clinton. If X1 is not a parent of Y1, Y1 is not a child of X1. Gertrude is a wolf. "Riga is not in America. A village road was narrow. Any person is male or female. Greg is a bear. The picture was painted by Leo. The city was destroyed. Mary read a book?
